Our Story

Hopkinton's Sweet Spot

We're Hop-Yo — a family-owned frozen yogurt and açaí shop rooted right here in Hopkinton, MA. We started with one simple idea: give this incredible community a place to celebrate the everyday moments with something genuinely delicious.

From post-soccer-practice treats to marathon weekend celebrations, we've made it our mission to serve up fresh, quality froyo and açaí with real ingredients, real care, and a smile every single time.

We rotate seasonal flavors, source thoughtfully, and keep things fun for every age — because great frozen yogurt should be for everyone.

🌱 Dairy-Free Options 🐄 Non-Fat Options ✨ Live Cultures 🏡 Family Owned 🎉 Party Catering
Family
Owned &
Operated 🧡
Rotating Menu

Froyo Flavors

All flavors feature live and active cultures. Options rotate — ask us what's on tap today!

Dairy-Free
Vegan
Non-Fat
Contains Allergen
Contains Soy
💙

Blue Raspberry Italian Ice

Bold, tangy blue raspberry in a refreshing Italian ice style. Bright color, even brighter flavor.

Dairy-Free Vegan Non-Fat
🍍

Pineapple Dole Whip Sorbet

The classic theme park favorite — creamy pineapple soft-serve with that signature tropical sweetness.

Dairy-Free Vegan Non-Fat
🍓

Raspberry Sorbet

Bright, tart raspberry bursting with fresh fruit flavor. Light, refreshing, and totally addictive.

Dairy-Free Vegan Non-Fat
🍦

Classic Tart

The classic tangy froyo — smooth, balanced, and perfectly refreshing. Zero fat, all flavor. 110 cal/serving.

Non-Fat Contains Milk
🍓

Strawberry

Real strawberry base blended into creamy froyo. Sweet, fruity, and bursting with fresh berry flavor. 130 cal/serving.

Contains Milk
👾

Cookie Monster

That iconic electric blue color with a sweet cookie base flavor. A guaranteed crowd-pleaser for all ages. 140 cal/serving.

Contains Milk Contains Soy
🌿

Mint

Cool, refreshing, and perfectly minty. A palate cleanser that doubles as a serious treat.

Non-Fat
🤍

White Chocolate Mousse

Silky white chocolate blended into a light, airy mousse-style froyo. Indulgently sweet and dreamy.

Contains Milk
🇮🇹

Vanilla Gelato

Silky smooth Italian-style vanilla with real vanilla bean. Luxuriously creamy and rich.

Contains Milk
🍫

Triple Chocolate

Deep, rich cocoa froyo made with alkali-processed cocoa. Bold chocolate flavor for serious chocoholics. 150 cal/serving.

Contains Milk
🍪

Oreo Cookies and Cream

Creamy froyo loaded with real chocolate cookie pieces. A timeless classic the whole family loves. 150 cal/serving.

Contains Milk Contains Wheat Contains Soy
🍪

Cookie Dough

Sweet vanilla froyo packed with real cookie dough bites. Like sneaking the spoon straight from the bowl.

Contains Milk Contains Wheat
🏃

Blend: Marathon Mix

Our signature race-day blend — a swirl of energizing flavors inspired by Hopkinton's famous starting line.

✨ Blend
🍓

Blend: Raspberry Tart

Raspberry Sorbet swirled with Classic Tart for a fruity, tangy combo that's refreshing and bright.

✨ Blend
🥜

Blend: Peanut Butter Cookie

Old Fashion Peanut Butter meets Cookie Monster in a rich, nutty, cookie-swirled dream.

The classic swirl — Vanilla Gelato meets Triple Chocolate in the ultimate timeless combination.

🍪

Blend: Oreo Cookie Dough

Oreo Cookies and Cream twisted with Cookie Dough — cookies squared, and completely irresistible.

✨ Blend Contains Milk Contains Wheat Contains Soy

✨ Blend flavors are unique swirls of two flavors — ask us what's on the machine today!

⚠️ Our facility handles nuts, soy, dairy, and gluten. Please inform staff of any allergies.

You Order... We Create

Açaí Bowls

Açaí (pronounced "Ah-Sah-Ee") is a superfood rich in antioxidants, renowned for its vast range of energy-boosting, cell healing, and immune-stimulating properties.

🌿 All bowls start with Organic Açaí & are Dairy-Free
⛰️

Build Your Own

Your way

Organic açaí with your choice of toppings. Add-ons: strawberries, blueberries, bananas, Nutella, granola, peanut butter, chocolate flakes, coconut flakes, honey.

⚠️ Granola contains nuts. Please inform staff of any allergies.

60+ Options

Topping Bar

Fresh, rotating, and ridiculously good. Mix and match to build your perfect creation.

* Toppings vary by season and availability. Ask your server for today's full selection.

🏃‍♀️
Boston Marathon Weekend

Hopkinton's Starting Line Treat

Every April, Hopkinton becomes the center of the running world — and we're right here for it. Whether you're running 26.2, cheering on a loved one, or just soaking in the energy of Marathon Monday, Hop-Yo is your reward.

We offer special marathon weekend hours and seasonal flavors inspired by the race. Stop in before the starting gun for fuel, or treat yourself after crossing the finish line (we'll be waiting).

🏅 Special Marathon Monday Hours & Flavors Every April
Events & Parties

Froyo Catering

Bring the Hop-Yo experience to your event! We cater birthdays, school events, corporate parties, and more.

🎂

Birthday Parties

Make it a party! We set up a mini froyo bar with flavors, toppings, and everything your guests need for a sweet celebration.

🏫

School & Sports Teams

Celebrate a season win or end-of-year event with a froyo treat for the whole team. Group rates available.

🏢

Corporate Events

From office parties to client appreciation days — we bring the fun, you take the credit. Customizable packages.

🎉

Community Events

Fairs, fundraisers, block parties — we love being part of the Hopkinton community. Let's make your event delicious.

📧 Reach out to us to plan your event: [email protected] or call us directly.
